title: ROSCraft
description: My first mod on Modrinth! A collection of ideas I wrote down on a piece of paper when I was younger, that I brought to life with the power of modding.
body:
Thank you for checking out ROSCraft. If you're wondering, the ROS stands for "Random Old Stuff". 

The mod is based off a bunch of ideas I drew on a piece of a paper over a decade ago. A few months ago, I decided to bring these ideas to life with the help of modding tools.

**Requires GeckoLib**

All content in the mod:

> 4 New Ores
- Apocalyps Ore (Shard and Apocalypse Sword)
- Healing Ore (Crystal and Healing Staff)
- Camarica (Crystal and full set of tools / Armor)
- Ferix Ore (Ore, Ingot and full set of tools / Armor)

 ![All of the ores and ore-related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c4e61d5df2910d362de818e6f79d4dc47b0af42.png)
 
> 10 New Mobs
- RoBox (Drops RoBox Orb)
- Mouse
- Killasaurus (Drops Killasaurus Talon, attacks Galopin)
- Tiny Imp (Drops Imp Pendant, can be tamed with Imp Pendants)
- Serial Killer (Drops Iron Knife, Spawns in raids)
- Hell Demon (Drops Demon Wings)
- Galopin (Drops Galopin Fur, can be ridden when wild, Spawns in groups in overworld biomes)
- Bufoz (Drops Bufoz Horn, Spawns in groups in overworld biomes)
- Arractros (Drops Arractros Crystal, Spawns in Caves)
- Cyclops (Drops Cyclops Club, Spawns in Swamps)

> 3 New unique pieces of equipment
- Extreme Pickaxe (Built with Ferix and Camarica pickaxe, Ferix Ingot, Camarica Crystal and Apocalypse Shard)
- Demon Wing Chestplate (Built with Iron Chestplate and Demon Wings, acts as Elytra but still gives armor. Yes, I predicted the Elytra.)
- Mega Sword (Built with Iron Knife, 2 Bufoz Horns, 2 Killasaurus Talons, a RoBox Orb and an Arractros Crystal)



** Forgive me for the inconsistent texturework, I'm still getting used to my tools and haven't quite mastered the minecraft art style yet **

Some questions you may have:

Q: Can I use this in my modpack?
A: Yes, absolutely, just link back to this page :)

Q: Will the mod be updated?
A: Yes and No, all content will come in a single wave, and I won't be updating it any further. However I may port it to newer versions or make some updates to the textures, models or animations.

Q: Can we expect more mods like this one from you?
A: Yes, I have some other mods in the making, that I will release in the future.
